name: cortex
description: Cortex — SDLC Automation Engine. 54 commands, 13 agents, 27 skills, 7 hooks, 18 reference docs. Forge production-ready software from idea to deployment with zero human intervention. Self-contained meta-process skills (brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, verification), production-ready frontend bar, always-runs-locally standard (one-command boot + verify gate), native Jira integration via the Atlassian MCP server, and scaffolders for apps, standalone MCP servers, and Claude Code plugins themselves.
